def b3_f001 {α : Type} : List α → Nat
| [] => 0
| _ :: xs => b3_f001 xs + 1

def b3_g001 {α : Type} : List α → Nat → Nat
| [], acc => acc
| _ :: xs, acc => b3_g001 xs (acc + 1)

theorem theorem_b3_p001 {α : Type} (xs : List α) (acc : Nat) :
    b3_g001 xs acc = b3_f001 xs + acc

def b3_f005 {α β : Type} (h : α → β) : List α → List β
| [] => []
| x :: xs => h x :: b3_f005 h xs

theorem theorem_b3_p005 {α β : Type} (h : α → β) (xs ys : List α) :
    b3_f005 h (xs ++ ys) = b3_f005 h xs ++ b3_f005 h ys

def b3_f007 {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) : List α → Bool
| [] => false
| x :: xs => p x || b3_f007 p xs

theorem theorem_b3_p007 {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) (xs ys : List α) :
    b3_f007 p (xs ++ ys) = (b3_f007 p xs || b3_f007 p ys)

def b3_m009 {α : Type} (z : α) : List α → Prop
| [] => False
| x :: xs => x = z ∨ b3_m009 z xs

def b3_f009 {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) : List α → List α
| [] => []
| x :: xs => if p x then x :: b3_f009 p xs else b3_f009 p xs

theorem theorem_b3_p009 {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) (z : α) (xs : List α) :
    b3_m009 z (b3_f009 p xs) → b3_m009 z xs

inductive B3T011 (α : Type) where
| leaf : B3T011 α
| node : B3T011 α → α → B3T011 α → B3T011 α

def b3_f011 {α : Type} : B3T011 α → Nat
| .leaf => 0
| .node l _ r => b3_f011 l + b3_f011 r + 1

def b3_g011 {α : Type} : B3T011 α → B3T011 α
| .leaf => .leaf
| .node l x r => .node (b3_g011 r) x (b3_g011 l)

theorem theorem_b3_p011 {α : Type} (t : B3T011 α) :
    b3_f011 (b3_g011 t) = b3_f011 t

inductive B3T013 (α : Type) where
| leaf : B3T013 α
| node : B3T013 α → α → B3T013 α → B3T013 α

def b3_f013 {α β : Type} (h : α → β) : B3T013 α → B3T013 β
| .leaf => .leaf
| .node l x r => .node (b3_f013 h l) (h x) (b3_f013 h r)

theorem theorem_b3_p013 {α : Type} (t : B3T013 α) :
    b3_f013 (fun x => x) t = t

inductive B3T015 (α : Type) where

def b3_f015 {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) : B3T015 α → Nat
| .leaf => 0
| .node l x r => b3_f015 p l + (if p x then 1 else 0) + b3_f015 p r

def b3_g015 {α : Type} : B3T015 α → B3T015 α
| .leaf => .leaf
| .node l x r => .node (b3_g015 r) x (b3_g015 l)

theorem theorem_b3_p015 {α : Type} (p : α → Bool) (t : B3T015 α) :
    b3_f015 p (b3_g015 t) = b3_f015 p t

def b3_f017 : Nat → Nat
| 0 => 0
| n + 1 => b3_f017 n + 2

theorem theorem_b3_p017 (n : Nat) :
    b3_f017 n = n + n
